title: Elves Behavin' Badly Elf Moving Ceiling Projector Christmas Illustrations 3 Modes
features: Elves behavin' badly elf ceiling projector will make your little one dream of Christmas joys.
The low-light nightlight function projects illustrations of Christmas stars, crackers, reindeer, elves and candy cane onto the ceiling
There are three modes to set the projector- colour change, night light and light rotation.
Choose the perfect one for your little one to have the best night sleep in the company of their favourite Christmas characters.
